--- graph_table_match_return.sql
SELECT id FROM GRAPH_TABLE (FinGraph MATCH (n:Person) RETURN n.id AS id)

--- AST
&ast.QueryStatement{
  Query: &ast.Select{
    Results: []ast.SelectItem{
      &ast.ExprSelectItem{
        Expr: &ast.Ident{
          NamePos: 7,
          NameEnd: 9,
          Name:    "id",
        },
      },
    },
    From: &ast.From{
      From:   10,
      Source: &ast.GraphTableExpr{
        GraphTable: 15,
        RParen:     71,
        GraphName:  &ast.Path{
          Idents: []*ast.Ident{
            &ast.Ident{
              NamePos: 28,
              NameEnd: 36,
              Name:    "FinGraph",
            },
          },
        },
        Query: &ast.GQLMultiLinearQueryStatement{
          Statements: []ast.GQLLinearQueryStatement{
            &ast.GQLSimpleLinearQueryStatement{
              Statements: []ast.GQLPrimitiveQueryStatement{
                &ast.GQLMatch{
                  Optional: -1,
                  Match:    37,
                  Pattern:  &ast.GQLGraphPattern{
                    Paths: []*ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                      &ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                        Path: &ast.GQLPathPattern{
                          Terms: []*ast.GQLPathTerm{
                            &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                              Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                                Lparen:  43,
                                Rparen:  52,
                                Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                                  EmptyPos: -1,
                                  Variable: &ast.Ident{
                                    NamePos: 44,
                                    NameEnd: 45,
                                    Name:    "n",
                                  },
                                  Label: &ast.GQLLabelFilter{
                                    Is:    -1,
                                    Colon: 45,
                                    Expr:  &ast.GQLNameLabel{
                                      Name: &ast.Ident{
                                        NamePos: 46,
                                        NameEnd: 52,
                                        Name:    "Person",
                                      },
                                    },
                                  },
                                },
                              },
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                    },
                  },
                },
                &ast.GQLReturn{
                  Return: 54,
                  Items:  []*ast.GQLReturnItem{
                    &ast.GQLReturnItem{
                      Star: -1,
                      Expr: &ast.Path{
                        Idents: []*ast.Ident{
                          &ast.Ident{
                            NamePos: 61,
                            NameEnd: 62,
                            Name:    "n",
                          },
                          &ast.Ident{
                            NamePos: 63,
                            NameEnd: 65,
                            Name:    "id",
                          },
                        },
                      },
                      Alias: &ast.AsAlias{
                        As:    66,
                        Alias: &ast.Ident{
                          NamePos: 69,
                          NameEnd: 71,
                          Name:    "id",
                        },
                      },
                    },
                  },
                },
              },
            },
          },
        },
      },
    },
  },
}

--- SQL
SELECT id FROM GRAPH_TABLE(FinGraph MATCH (n:Person) RETURN n.id AS id)
